title: Happy Ghast but Fast (8x Speed)
description: This makes the happy ghast faster using Minecraft attributes
body: In this datapack, Happy Ghasts are feeling extra cheerful and energetic! Their flying speed attribute has been boosted to make them eight times faster than normal, letting them zoom joyfully through the Nether skies. These spirited Ghasts drift and dart around with playful energy, turning encounters into lively, fast-paced spectacles. Watch as they soar, spin, and float with newfound happiness, spreading chaos and smiles wherever they go!
